city: noun. A large settlement, bigger than a town; sometimes with a specific legal definition, depending on the place.
icy: adjective. Pertaining to, resembling, or abounding in ice; cold; frosty.
inti: noun. The currency of Peru between 1985 and 1991, replacing the sol.
ivy: noun. Any of several woody, climbing, or trailing evergreen plants of the genus Hedera.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
tic: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tira.
tin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tindi.
vicinity: noun. Proximity; the state of being near.
vinic: adjective. Of or pertaining to wine.
viny: adjective. Resembling or characteristic of a vine, especially in being twisty.
yin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Yinchia.
